review_text: {"verdict":"CHANGES_REQUESTED","summary":"The executor is a well-structured fail-closed design with strong isolation, immutable action pins, no-tools Claude invocation, and layered live rechecks. However the budget ledger is not concurrency-safe against parallel dispatches, allowing the total/per-pilot Claude review cap to be exceeded, and the SECURITY.md itself flags an unresolved public-metadata disclosure of the private Season 2 Head SHA and request ID that remains only gated by an activation flag rather than removed. A test also asserts a claim (unified=3 context sufficiency) it cannot prove.","findings":[{"severity":"P1","status":"open","finding":"verify_run_budget counts dispatch runs via the GitHub Actions API with no serialization or reservation lock. Two concurrent workflow_dispatch runs can each observe count<=limit before either increments, letting maximum_claude_reviews_total (6) and per_pilot (2) be exceeded. concurrency group cancel-in-progress:false serializes execution but the budget read/write is TOCTOU across runs.","status_dup":"open"},{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"SECURITY.md item 8 admits the public dispatch exposes PR number, private Season 2 Head SHA, reservation and request IDs as Actions event metadata, gated only by public_dispatch_metadata_accepted. Active test config sets this True, so activation can leak private Season 2 SHAs into public Action logs. Prefers an opaque broker but ships the leaky path.","status2":"open"},{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"emit-prompt-env writes the full untrusted evidence prompt into GITHUB_ENV. If any later step enables ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG the delimiter/value could be exposed; mitigation relies solely on manual actions_step_debug_disabled_verified flag, not an enforced check in-workflow. Fail-closed depends on human attestation.","x":"open"},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"test_review_diff_uses_standard_bounded_context only greps source text for '--unified=3' and absence of '--unified=40'. It does not exercise bounded_diff to prove context adequacy or that reviewers see enough surrounding lines; the test does not prove its implied claim about review completeness.","y":"open"},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"finish_attempt marks failed/succeeded but a process crash after reserve_attempt and before finish leaves a 'started' entry that still counts toward window/daily caps permanently, silently shrinking future capacity with no reconciliation path.","z":"open"},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"Immutable SHA-pinned actions, no-tools Claude invocation, read-only GITHUB_TOKEN, dispatch-only credential workflow, secret-pattern denial, and rerun-attempt gating are correctly implemented and quality-gate enforced.","w":"closed"}],"verification":["Claude invocation passes empty --tools, --setting-sources '', --strict-mcp-config and disallowedTools; no file/shell/web/MCP tools reach the model.","validate_result enforces APPROVE cannot carry an open P0/P1/P2 finding and strips injection of structured fields.","quality-gate.sh statically forbids mutable action refs, write permissions, and non-dispatch triggers on the credential workflow.","Duplicate diff, duplicate-key JSON, and unstructured output are forced to CHANGES_REQUESTED via bridge tests.","verify_remote_state binds PR head SHA, base policy SHA, single allowed path, reservation identity, and dedup marker before publish."],"requirement_coverage":["Credential exposure: secret-pattern scanning and read-only tokens covered; residual public-metadata disclosure flagged.","Unsafe automation: no merge/push/deploy; forbidden_effects enforced in config validation.","Fail-closed: paused status denies before credentials; missing/stale/duplicate state denies.","Budget bypass: caps exist but concurrent-dispatch TOCTOU on the run-count ledger is not closed.","Unsupported claims: model output injection guards and marker binding covered."],"residual_risk":["Concurrent dispatches can race the API-based budget count and exceed total/per-pilot Claude review caps.","Public Actions metadata may disclose private Season 2 Head SHA and request IDs if the acceptance flag is set at activation.","Orphaned 'started' ledger entries permanently consume window/daily capacity after a crash with no reconciliation."]}
reason: Unstructured Claude output is useful feedback but can never authorize approval.
